summary: Passive buzzer driven by PWM for melody and tone generation. Supports frequency control for musical notes and alarm tones.
notes: Passive buzzer has no built-in oscillator; must drive with square wave (PWM).
Frequency determines tone pitch: C4=262Hz, D4=294Hz, E4=330Hz, etc.
Use NPN transistor for buzzers rated above 20mA.

app_logic_snippets.api_summary: PassiveBuzzer_Init() PassiveBuzzer_Tone(freq_hz, duration_ms) PassiveBuzzer_PlayNote(note, duration_ms) PassiveBuzzer_PlayMelody(notes, len) PassiveBuzzer_Stop() PassiveBuzzer_Tick()
app_logic_snippets.notes: Common note frequencies: C4=262 D4=294 E4=330 F4=349 G4=392 A4=440 B4=494 C5=523. PlayMelody() is non-blocking; call Tick() in main loop.
